MOTION TO STRIKE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION THE CLAIM OF DANIEL FEWEL FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR SEP-17-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF DANIEL FEWEL - THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED, WITH LEAVE FOR CLAIMANT TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. CLAIMANT FILED A "CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE" FORM. ON BOX 5, HE HAS NOT SPECIFIED THE NATURE OF HIS "INTEREST IN THE CLAIMED PROPERTY," OTHER THAN TO IDENTIFY THE PROPERTY ITSELF AS "CASH CURRENCY AND FANNY PACK." IF CLAIMANT CONTENDS THAT HE IS THE "OWNER" OF THE PROPERTY, HE MUST CHECK BOX 5(A), OR OTHERWISE EXPLAIN IN PARAGRAPH 5 WHAT IS HIS "INTEREST IN THE CLAIMED PROPERTY." THE MOVING PARTY SHALL SERVE A BLANK COPY OF JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM MC 200 WITH THIS ORDER. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED TO THIS MOTION TO STRIKE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976 =302/MJM

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO STRIKE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RAYMOND FONG, ASSISTANT DISTRICT ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 845-5807 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION TO STRIKE the claim of Daniel Fewel - The motion to strike is granted, with leave for claimant to file an amended Claim Opposing Forfeiture within 15 days of notice of entry of this order. Claimant filed a "Claim Opposing Forfeiture" form. On box 5, he has not specified the nature of his "interest in the claimed property," other than to identify the property itself as "cash currency and fanny pack." If Claimant contends that he is the "owner" of the property, he must check box 5(a), or otherwise explain in paragraph 5 what is his "interest in the claimed property." The moving party shall serve a blank copy of Judicial Council Form MC 200 with this Order. No opposition was filed to this motion to strike. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
